creator: rick@lgarchitecture.com
text:
I need to update this port again before it is committed in light of 2
issues:

1) There was a patch recently added to this port since the time of this
PR: See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152389
and http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=152978

2) And on 12/2 there was an announcement on the GRUB mailing list about
the decision to merge ZFS from grub-extras into the mainstream GRUB
source:
http://mail.opensolaris.org/pipermail/zfs-discuss/2010-December/046326.html

Please allow me some time to re-sync things.
